title: 新手教程 Beginner Tutorial Series
description: Evergreen SEO content for beginners — structured learning path from zero to intermediate

tasks.text: Outline 12-episode beginner curriculum: rules → basic kills → openings → endgame
Ep 1-3: Rules, piece movement, basic checkmate patterns (马后炮, 天地炮)
Ep 4-6: Top 5 popular openings with simple explanations
Ep 7-9: Middle game tactics and piece coordination
Ep 10-12: Essential endgame patterns (top 50 basic positions)
SEO-optimize titles and descriptions for search discovery
Create downloadable practice position sets for each episode
